if.if: AND T.CREAT_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{todoFromDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{todoToDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')+1

sql.if: AND T.TODO_CF_DT IS NULL --확인일자 없는것 AND T.SANCTN_STTUS = 'N'
AND ( T.SANCTN_STTUS = #{sanctnSttus} /* OR T.TODO_CF_OPN IS NOT NULL */ )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_WB20M03 T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM05M01 X ON X.CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 B ON T.TODO_ID = B.ID WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_WB20M03 T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM05M01 X ON X.CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 B ON T.TODO_ID = B.ID WHERE 1 = 1
) + (SELECT COUNT(*) AS VIEW_SORT FROM TB_WB24M02 AS ISU --WBS이슈 정보 LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01M01 AS QM ON QM.REQ_NO = ISU.REQ_NO WHERE 1=1 AND ( (NVL(QM.REQ_ST,'REQST01') != 'REQST03' AND ISU.ISS_STS != 'ISSSTS03') OR (NVL(ISU.ISS_STS,'ISSSTS01') != 'ISSSTS03' AND ISU.REQ_NO IS NULL) ) AND (ISU.ACT_ID = #{salesMngId} OR QM.ORDRG_ID = #{salesMngId} ) ) FROM DUAL;

SELECT Z.* FROM ( SELECT X.* , ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT T.CO_CD , T.TODO_KEY --TO DO KEY , T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID --TO DO 구분(공유-결재) , T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID) AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM --TO DO 구분(공유-결재) 명 , X.CODE_NM AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM --발생프로그램 명 , T.SALES_CD --Sales Code , T.TODO_NO --관리번호 , T.SANCTN_SN --결제순번 ,T.TODO_ID , B.NAME AS TODO_NM --대상자명 /* 결재요청자와 결재자가 같은 팀이면 팀장구분을 리턴하고 그외는 공백으로 처리함(이슈 결재처리시 위험도평가에서 사용함 */ , CASE WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2090' AND C.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2020' AND QP.SAME_TIME_RESULT = 'Y' AND D.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2030' AND D.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' ELSE '' END AS TEAM_MANAGER --작성자 담당팀장인경우에 평가 , T.SANCTN_STTUS , T.PG_PATH , T.TODO_FILE_TRGT_KEY , T.TODO_NO , CASE WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2100' OR T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV1100') THEN (T.TODO_NO ||' ' || T.ETC_FIELD2 || '차') ELSE T.TODO_NO END AS SHW_TODO_NO , T.PG_PARAM , TO_CHAR(T.TODO_CF_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TODO_CF_DT --확인일자 , T.TODO_CF_OPN --확인의견 , T.CREAT_ID --생성자 , C.NAME AS CREAT_NM /*생성자명 */ , TO_CHAR(T.CREAT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREAT_DTTM --생성일시 , T.UDT_ID --최종변경자 , ( SELECT A.NAME FROM TB_CM06M01 AS A WHERE A.ID = T.UDT_ID ) AS UDT_NM /*변경자명 */ , TO_CHAR(T.UDT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UDT_DTTM --최종변경일자 , T.TODO_TITL AS TODO_TITL , T.CREAT_PGM , T.ETC_FIELD2 FROM TB_WB20M03 T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM05M01 X ON X.CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 B ON T.TODO_ID = B.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 C ON T.CREAT_ID = C.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01P01 QP ON T.TODO_NO = QP.REQ_NO OR T.TODO_NO = QP.RSLT_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01M01 QM ON QP.REQ_NO = QM.REQ_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 D ON QM.ORDRG_ID = D.ID WHERE 1 = 1
/* ORDER BY T.SALES_CD DESC, T.TODO_NO DESC, T.SANCTN_SN DESC */ ORDER BY TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM, TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM, T.CREAT_DTTM DESC, SALES_CD DESC, TODO_NM ) AS X WHERE 1=1 ) AS Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.RN BETWEEN ${firstIndex} AND ${lastIndex}

SELECT Z.* FROM ( SELECT X.* , ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT T.CO_CD , TO_CHAR(T.TODO_KEY) AS TODO_KEY --TO DO KEY , T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID --TO DO 구분(공유-결재) , T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID) AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM --TO DO 구분(공유-결재) 명 , X.CODE_NM AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM --발생프로그램 명 , T.SALES_CD --Sales Code , T.TODO_NO --관리번호 , T.SANCTN_SN --결제순번 ,T.TODO_ID , B.NAME AS TODO_NM --대상자명 /* 결재요청자와 결재자가 같은 팀이면 팀장구분을 리턴하고 그외는 공백으로 처리함(이슈 결재처리시 위험도평가에서 사용함 */ , CASE WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2090' AND C.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2020' AND QP.SAME_TIME_RESULT = 'Y' AND D.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2030' AND D.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' ELSE '' END AS TEAM_MANAGER --작성자 담당팀장인경우에 평가 , T.SANCTN_STTUS , T.PG_PATH , T.TODO_FILE_TRGT_KEY , T.TODO_NO , CASE WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2100' OR T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV1100') THEN (T.TODO_NO ||' ' || T.ETC_FIELD2 || '차') ELSE T.TODO_NO END AS SHW_TODO_NO , T.PG_PARAM , TO_CHAR(T.TODO_CF_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TODO_CF_DT --확인일자 , T.TODO_CF_OPN --확인의견 , T.CREAT_ID --생성자 , C.NAME AS CREAT_NM /*생성자명 */ , TO_CHAR(T.CREAT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREAT_DTTM --생성일시 , T.UDT_ID --최종변경자 , ( SELECT A.NAME FROM TB_CM06M01 AS A WHERE A.ID = T.UDT_ID ) AS UDT_NM /*변경자명 */ , TO_CHAR(T.UDT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UDT_DTTM --최종변경일자 , T.TODO_TITL AS TODO_TITL , T.CREAT_PGM , T.ETC_FIELD2 , '' AS ORDRS_NO , '' AS WORK_RPT_RMK , '' AS ISS_STS , '' AS REQ_ST , '' AS DUDT_INTEND_DT , '' AS VIEW_SORT , NVL(QP.SAME_TIME_RESULT,'N') AS SAME_TIME_RESULT --발주요청서와 결과를 동시에 등록한 자료 구분 FROM TB_WB20M03 T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM05M01 X ON X.CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 B ON T.TODO_ID = B.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 C ON T.CREAT_ID = C.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01P01 AS QP ON T.TODO_NO = QP.REQ_NO OR T.TODO_NO = QP.RSLT_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01M01 QM ON QP.REQ_NO = QM.REQ_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 D ON QM.ORDRG_ID = D.ID WHERE 1 = 1
UNION ALL SELECT ISU.CO_CD AS CO_CD --회사코드 , ISU.FILE_TRGT_KEY AS FILE_TRGT_KEY --이슈 FILE_TRGT_KEY , 'TODODIV99' AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID , 'TODODIV9999' AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , '문제' AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM , CASE WHEN ISU.ISS_STS = 'ISSSTS04' THEN '문제진행상태' ELSE '문제미완료현황' END AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM , ISU.SALES_CD AS SALES_CD --SALES Code , ISU.ISS_NO AS TODO_NO , 1 AS SANCTN_SN , decode(ISU.REQ_NO, '', ISU.ACT_ID, QM.ORDRG_ID) AS TODO_ID --조치담당자 , decode(ISU.REQ_NO, '', B2.NAME, B4.NAME) AS TODO_NM , '' AS TEAM_MANAGER , 'N' AS SANCTN_STTUS , 'PG_PATH' AS PG_PATH , QM.FILE_TRGT_KEY AS TODO_FILE_TRGT_KEY , ISU.REQ_NO AS TODO_NO , ISU.ISS_NO AS SHW_TODO_NO --이슈번호 , '' AS PG_PARAM , '' AS TODO_CF_DT , '' AS TODO_CF_OPN , ISU.CREAT_ID AS CREAT_ID , B.NAME AS CREAT_NM , TO_CHAR(ISU.CREAT_DTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREAT_DTTM , '' AS UDT_ID , '' AS UDT_NM , '' AS UDT_DTTM , ISU.ISS_SJ AS TODO_TITL --이슈제목 , '' AS CREAT_PGM , '' AS ETC_FIELD2 , Y.ORDRS_NO AS ORDRS_NO , ISU.ISS_CNTS AS WORK_RPT_RMK --이슈내용 , decode(ISU.REQ_NO, '', ISU.ISS_STS, QM.REQ_ST) AS ISS_STS --이슈상태 , QM.REQ_ST AS REQ_ST , TO_CHAR(CR.DUDT_INTEND_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUDT_INTEND_DT --수주 납기예정일 ->고객요구일 , CASE WHEN QM.REQ_ST = 'REQST03' THEN 3 WHEN ISU.ISS_STS = 'ISSSTS03' THEN 3 WHEN QM.REQ_ST IS NOT NULL THEN 2 WHEN ISU.ISS_STS = 'ISSSTS02' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS VIEW_SORT , NVL(QP.SAME_TIME_RESULT,'N') AS SAME_TIME_RESULT --발주요청서와 결과를 동시에 등록한 자료 구분 FROM TB_WB24M02 AS ISU --WBS이슈 정보 LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR02D02 AS CR ON ISU.CO_CD= CR.CO_CD AND ISU.SALES_CD = CR.SALES_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR02M01 AS Y ON ISU.CO_CD= Y.CO_CD AND CR.ORDRS_NO = Y.ORDRS_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 AS B ON ISU.CREAT_ID = B.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 AS B2 ON ISU.ACT_ID = B2.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_WB24M03 AS ACT ON ISU.ISS_NO = ACT.ISS_NO --실적이슈 조치내용 LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01M01 AS QM ON QM.REQ_NO = ISU.REQ_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 AS B4 ON QM.ORDRG_ID = B4.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01P01 AS QP ON QP.REQ_NO = QM.REQ_NO WHERE 1=1 AND ( (NVL(QM.REQ_ST,'REQST01') != 'REQST03' AND ISU.ISS_STS != 'ISSSTS03') OR (NVL(ISU.ISS_STS,'ISSSTS01') != 'ISSSTS03' AND ISU.REQ_NO IS NULL) ) AND (ISU.ACT_ID = #{salesMngId} OR QM.ORDRG_ID = #{salesMngId} ) ORDER BY TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM, TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM, CREAT_DTTM DESC, SALES_CD DESC, TODO_NM ) AS X WHERE 1=1 ) AS Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.RN BETWEEN ${firstIndex} AND ${lastIndex}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_WB20M03 SET SANCTN_STTUS = 'Y', TODO_CF_DT = SYSDATE, UDT_ID = #{creatId}, UDT_PGM = #{creatPgm}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TODO_KEY = #{todoKey}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(A.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID) AS TODO_PGM_NM FROM TB_WB20M03 A GROUP BY A.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID

SELECT Y.ID, Y.NAME, Y.DEPT_ID, D.DEPT_NM, Y.LEVEL_CD, L.LEVEL_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(X.TODO_CF_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '') AS TODO_CF_DT /* 승인일자 */ FROM ( SELECT TODO_KEY, CO_CD, TODO_ID, TODO_CF_DT FROM TB_WB20M03 WHERE TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv1CodeId} AND TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv2CodeId} AND SALES_CD = #{salesCd} AND TODO_FILE_TRGT_KEY = #{fileTrgtKey} ORDER BY TODO_KEY ASC ) X INNER JOIN TB_CM06M01 Y ON X.CO_CD = Y.CO_CD AND X.TODO_ID = Y.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM04M01 D ON Y.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM07M01 L ON Y.LEVEL_CD = L.LEVEL_CD
SELECT CODE_ID, CODE_NM FROM TB_CM05M01 WHERE CODE_ID LIKE 'COBGB%'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_WB20M03 SET TODO_CF_DT = '' , SANCTN_STTUS = 'N' , TODO_CF_OPN = '' , UDT_ID = #{userId} , UDT_PGM = #{pgmId} , UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE , ETC_FIELD1 = #{etcField1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --팀장 작업공수 입력용으로 활용 2025.07.22 WHERE TODO_NO = #{todoNo} --해당업무 마스터 번호 AND SANCTN_SN = #{sanctnSn} --결재순번 AND TODO_ID = #{userId} --결재대상자ID AND TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv1CodeId} --공유결재구분 AND TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv2CodeId} --구분프로그램
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, ROWNUM AS SANCTN_SN, A.* FROM ( SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT A.CO_CD AS WBS_PLANCO_CD, A.CO_CD, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(A.CO_CD) WBS_PLANCO_CD_NM, A.ID AS USR_NM, A.EMP_NO AS EMP_NO, A.NAME AS NAME, A.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO, A.EMAIL AS EMAIL, B.DEPT_NM AS DT_NM, D.LEVEL_NM AS JIK, 'TODODIV20' AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, '결재' AS GB , C.APP_SEQ AS SANCTN_SN , '' AS SANCTN_STTUS , C.APP_ID AS TODO_ID , '미승인' AS SANCTN_STTUS_NM , 'I' AS FLAG , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY C.APP_NO DESC) AS RNK FROM TB_CM06M01 A INNER JOIN TB_BM13M01 C ON(A.ID = C.APP_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM07M01 D ON A.LEVEL_CD = D.LEVEL_CD INNER JOIN TB_CM04M01 B ON(A.DEPT_ID = B.DEPT_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND C.ID = #{userId} AND C.APP_DIV = #{appDiv} /* 발주서 */ ORDER BY C.APP_SEQ ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 AND T.RNK = 1 ) AS A )

SELECT A.CO_CD AS CO_CD, C.CODE_NM AS CO_NM, A.ID AS ID, A.ID AS TODO_ID, A.EMP_NO AS EMP_NO, A.NAME AS USR_NM, A.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO, A.EMAIL AS EMAIL, B.DEPT_NM AS DT_NM , (SELECT T.LEVEL_NM FROM TB_CM07M01 T WHERE T.LEVEL_CD=A.LEVEL_CD) AS LEVEL_NM FROM TB_CM06M01 A INNER JOIN TB_CM04M01 B on A.DEPT_ID = B.DEPT_ID INNER JOIN TB_CM05M01 C ON A.CO_CD = C.CODE_ID AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.ID = #{userId}
SELECT NVL(MAX(TODO_KEY)+1, 1) FROM TB_WB20M03
SELECT TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM DUAL

SELECT CASE WHEN( SUM(STATUS_NO) = MAX(MAX_SN) ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS APPROVAL_YN FROM ( SELECT DECODE(SANCTN_STTUS, 'Y', 1, 0) AS STATUS_NO , MAX(SANCTN_SN) OVER() MAX_SN FROM TB_WB20M03 WHERE 1=1 AND TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv2CodeId} AND SALES_CD = #{salesCd} AND TODO_NO = #{todoNo} )

SELECT T.CO_CD , T.TODO_KEY , T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID --TO DO 구분(공유-결재) , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID) AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM --TO DO 구분(공유-결재)명 , T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , (SELECT X.CODE_NM FROM TB_CM05M01 X WHERE X.CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID) AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM --발생프로그램 명 , T.SALES_CD --Sales Code , T.TODO_NO --관리번호 ,T.TODO_ID , ( SELECT A.NAME FROM TB_CM06M01 AS A WHERE A.ID = T.TODO_ID ) AS TODO_NM --대상자명 , TO_CHAR(T.TODO_CF_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TODO_CF_DT --확인일자 , T.TODO_CF_OPN --확인의견 , T.CREAT_ID --생성자 , ( SELECT A.NAME FROM TB_CM06M01 AS A WHERE A.ID = T.CREAT_ID ) AS CREAT_NM /*생성자명 */ , TO_CHAR(T.CREAT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREAT_DTTM --생성일시 , T.UDT_ID --최종변경자 , ( SELECT A.NAME FROM TB_CM06M01 AS A WHERE A.ID = T.UDT_ID ) AS UDT_NM /*변경자명 */ , TO_CHAR(T.UDT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UDT_DTTM --최종변경일자 , T.TODO_TITL AS TODO_TITL FROM TB_WB20M03 T WHERE TODO_KEY = #{todoKey}
SELECT A.TODO_NO , MIN(NVL(A.SANCTN_STTUS, 'N')) TODO_YN FROM TB_WB20M03 A WHERE 1=1 AND TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv2CodeId} AND TODO_NO = #{todoNo} GROUP BY A.TODO_NO

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT T.* , NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM TB_WB20M03 S WHERE S.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID AND S.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID AND S.SALES_CD = T.SALES_CD AND S.TODO_NO = T.TODO_NO AND S.SANCTN_STTUS = 'N' AND S.TODO_ID != T.TODO_ID AND S.SANCTN_SN < T.SANCTN_SN ), 0) AS BEFORE_NOT_CONFIRM --이전미결자료 존재여부 FROM TB_WB20M03 T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM05M01 X ON X.CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID ) T WHERE 1=1
AND BEFORE_NOT_CONFIRM = 0 --이전 미결자료 존재 여부 (전무님만 해당되게 변경 처리함 2025.03.06)

SELECT T.CO_CD , T.TODO_KEY --TO DO KEY , T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID --TO DO 구분(공유-결재) , T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID) AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM --TO DO 구분(공유-결재) 명 , X.CODE_NM AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM --발생프로그램 명 , T.SALES_CD --Sales Code , T.TODO_NO --관리번호 , T.SANCTN_SN --결제순번 , T.TODO_ID , B.NAME AS TODO_NM --대상자명 /* 결재요청자와 결재자가 같은 팀이면 팀장구분을 리턴하고 그외는 공백으로 처리함(이슈 결재처리시 위험도평가에서 사용함 * 계획이슈 조치결과, 실적이슈 조치결과는 팀장이 위험도 평가를 해야함 */ , CASE WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2090' AND C.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2020' AND QP.SAME_TIME_RESULT = 'Y' AND D.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2030' AND D.MNG_ID = B.ID AND B.TEAM_MANAGER = 'TEAM01') THEN '평가' ELSE '' END AS TEAM_MANAGER --작성자 담당팀장인경우에 평가 , T.SANCTN_STTUS , T.PG_PATH , T.TODO_FILE_TRGT_KEY , T.TODO_NO , CASE WHEN (T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2100' OR T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV1100') THEN (T.TODO_NO ||' ' || T.ETC_FIELD2 || '차') ELSE T.TODO_NO END AS SHW_TODO_NO , T.PG_PARAM , TO_CHAR(T.TODO_CF_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TODO_CF_DT --확인일자 , T.TODO_CF_OPN --확인의견 , T.CREAT_ID --생성자 , C.NAME AS CREAT_NM /*생성자명 */ , TO_CHAR(T.CREAT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREAT_DTTM --생성일시 , T.UDT_ID --최종변경자 , ( SELECT A.NAME FROM TB_CM06M01 AS A WHERE A.ID = T.UDT_ID ) AS UDT_NM /*변경자명 */ , TO_CHAR(T.UDT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UDT_DTTM --최종변경일자 , T.TODO_TITL AS TODO_TITL , T.CREAT_PGM , T.ETC_FIELD2 , NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM TB_WB20M03 S WHERE S.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID AND S.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID AND S.SALES_CD = T.SALES_CD AND S.TODO_NO = T.TODO_NO AND S.SANCTN_STTUS = 'N' AND S.TODO_ID != T.TODO_ID AND S.SANCTN_SN < T.SANCTN_SN ), 0) AS BEFORE_NOT_CONFIRM --이전미결자료 존재여부 FROM TB_WB20M03 T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM05M01 X ON X.CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 B ON T.TODO_ID = B.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 C ON T.CREAT_ID = C.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01P01 QP ON T.TODO_NO = QP.REQ_NO OR T.TODO_NO = QP.RSLT_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_QM01M01 QM ON QP.REQ_NO = QM.REQ_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM06M01 D ON QM.ORDRG_ID = D.ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.SANCTN_STTUS = 'N' AND T.TODO_KEY = #{todoKey} AND T.TODO_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_WB20M03 SET TODO_CF_DT = '', TODO_CF_OPN = #{todoCfOpn}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE, ETC_FIELD3 = '' WHERE TODO_KEY = #{todoKey}
mapper.select: SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(A.CODE_NM, S.CODE_NM), '결제', ''), '결재', ''), '공유', '') AS TASK_NM , A.CODE_ID AS APPR_CODE_ID , NVL(AD.RECEIVE_YN, 'Y') AS APPR_RECEIVE_YN , TO_CHAR(AD.CHK_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS APPR_CHK_DTTM , S.CODE_ID AS SHARE_CODE_ID , NVL(SD.RECEIVE_YN, 'Y') AS SHARE_RECEIVE_YN , TO_CHAR(SD.CHK_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SHARE_CHK_DTTM , COALESCE(AD.REMARK, SD.REMARK, '') AS REMARK FROM TB_CM05M01 S LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM05M01 A ON A.CODE_KIND = 'TODODIV20' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.CODE_ID != 'TODODIV2180' AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.CODE_NM, '결제', ''), '결재', ''), '공유', '') = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(S.CODE_NM, '결제', ''), '결재', ''), '공유', '') LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_WB20D01 AD ON AD.CO_CD = #{coCd} AND AD.USER_ID = #{userId} AND AD.CODE_ID = A.CODE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_WB20D01 SD ON SD.CO_CD = #{coCd} AND SD.USER_ID = #{userId} AND SD.CODE_ID = S.CODE_ID WHERE S.CODE_KIND = 'TODODIV10' AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(S.CODE_ID, 'TODODIV', ''))

SELECT TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(T.CODE_ETC, '[^,]+', 1, N.LVL)) AS USER_ID FROM TB_CM05M01 T JOIN ( SELECT LEVEL AS LVL FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 100 ) N ON N.LVL <= REGEXP_COUNT(T.CODE_ETC, ',') + 1 WHERE T.CODE_KIND = 'SPECRTS' AND T.CODE_ID = 'SPECRTS02' -- PFU공유자 코드 ORDER BY N.LVL;
SELECT NVL(MAX(TODO_KEY), 0) + 1 FROM TB_WB20M03
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_WB20M03 SET TODO_CF_DT = SYSDATE , SANCTN_STTUS = 'Y' , TODO_CF_OPN = '' , UDT_ID = #{userId} , UDT_PGM = #{pgmId} , UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TODO_NO = #{todoNo} --해당업무 마스터 번호 AND TODO_ID = #{userId} --결재대상자ID AND TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv1CodeId} --공유결재구분 AND TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2060' --구분프로그램 AND SANCTN_STTUS = 'N'
mapper.select:
WITH BASE_ALL AS ( SELECT T.TODO_NO , T.TODO_ID , T.SANCTN_STTUS , T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , T.SALES_CD , T.TODO_KEY , T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID , T.CO_CD , T.TODO_FILE_TRGT_KEY , T.PG_PATH , T.PG_PARAM , T.TODO_TITL , T.ETC_FIELD2 , T.CREAT_PGM , CASE WHEN T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV010' THEN '공유' ELSE '결재' END AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM FROM TB_WB20M03 T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.CO_CD = #{coCd} AND T.CREAT_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{todoFromDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{todoToDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1 AND T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = #{todoDivId} ) , SEARCH_ALL AS ( SELECT T.* , CASE WHEN 1=1 AND T.TODO_ID = #{salesMngId} --공유대상자 AND T.TODO_NO LIKE '%'||#{todoNo}||'%' AND T.SALES_CD LIKE '%'||#{salesCd}||'%' AND T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv} --구분 AND T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = #{todoDiv2CodeId} --요청 AND B.NAME LIKE '%' || #{salesMngNm} || '%' AND X.CODE_NM = #{todoDivDetail} --요청 AND T.SANCTN_STTUS = #{sanctnSttus, jdbcType=VARCHAR} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS SEARCH_MATCH_FLAG , CASE WHEN LENGTH(T.SALES_CD) >= 5 AND TRANSLATE(SUBSTR(T.SALES_CD, 1, 5), '1234567890', '##########') = '#####' THEN SUBSTR(T.SALES_CD, 1, 5) ELSE NULL END AS ORDRS_NO_VAL FROM BASE_ALL T LEFT JOIN TB_CM06M01 B ON B.ID = T.TODO_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM05M01 X ON X.CODE_KIND = 'TODODIV20' AND X.CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID ) /* ========== 문제관련 결재및공유 ========== */ , BASE_WBS AS ( SELECT * FROM SEARCH_ALL WHERE TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ( 'TODODIV2060', 'TODODIV2090', 'TODODIV2020', 'TODODIV2030', -- 결재 'TODODIV1030', 'TODODIV1090', 'TODODIV1040', 'TODODIV1050' -- 공유 ) ) /* 각 타입별 대표키 지정 (중복 노드 방지) */ , BASE_WBS_REP AS ( SELECT T.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TODO_NO, TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID ORDER BY SEARCH_MATCH_FLAG DESC, TODO_KEY ASC) AS RN FROM BASE_WBS T ) , BASE_WBS_ONLY AS ( SELECT * FROM BASE_WBS_REP WHERE RN = 1 ) /* 발주요청 -> 문제 연결 */ , WBS_REQ AS ( SELECT QM.ISS_NO AS BASE_ISS_TODO_NO , T.TODO_KEY, T.TODO_NO, QM.ISS_NO, T.TODO_NO AS REQ_NO , 3 AS CHAIN_SEQ , (SELECT MIN(B2.TODO_KEY) FROM BASE_WBS_ONLY B2 WHERE B2.TODO_NO = QM.ISS_NO AND B2.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV2060', 'TODODIV1030') AND B2.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID) AS PAR_TODO_KEY FROM BASE_WBS_ONLY T JOIN TB_QM01M01 QM ON QM.REQ_NO = T.TODO_NO WHERE T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV2020', 'TODODIV1040') ) /* WBS문제(ISS) */ , WBS_ISS AS ( SELECT T.TODO_NO AS BASE_ISS_TODO_NO , T.TODO_KEY, T.TODO_NO, T.TODO_NO AS ISS_NO, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS REQ_NO , 1 AS CHAIN_SEQ , CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS PAR_TODO_KEY FROM BASE_WBS_ONLY T WHERE T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV2060', 'TODODIV1030') ) /* WBS조치(ACT) -> 문제 */ , WBS_ACT AS ( SELECT T.TODO_NO AS BASE_ISS_TODO_NO , T.TODO_KEY, T.TODO_NO, T.TODO_NO AS ISS_NO, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS REQ_NO , 2 AS CHAIN_SEQ , (SELECT MIN(B2.TODO_KEY) FROM BASE_WBS_ONLY B2 WHERE B2.TODO_NO = T.TODO_NO AND B2.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV2060', 'TODODIV1030') AND B2.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID) AS PAR_TODO_KEY FROM BASE_WBS_ONLY T WHERE T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV2090', 'TODODIV1090') ) /* 발주결과(RSLT) -> 발주요청 */ , WBS_RSLT AS ( SELECT QM.ISS_NO AS BASE_ISS_TODO_NO , T.TODO_KEY, T.TODO_NO, QM.ISS_NO, QP.REQ_NO , 4 AS CHAIN_SEQ , (SELECT MIN(B2.TODO_KEY) FROM BASE_WBS_ONLY B2 WHERE B2.TODO_NO = QP.REQ_NO AND B2.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV2020', 'TODODIV1040') AND B2.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID) AS PAR_TODO_KEY FROM BASE_WBS_ONLY T JOIN TB_QM01P01 QP ON QP.RSLT_NO = T.TODO_NO LEFT JOIN TB_QM01M01 QM ON QM.REQ_NO = QP.REQ_NO WHERE T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV2030', 'TODODIV1050') ) /* WBS문제 통합 */ , CONF_WBS AS ( SELECT W.*, 'N' AS IS_DIRECT FROM WBS_ISS W UNION ALL SELECT W.*, 'N' FROM WBS_ACT W UNION ALL SELECT W.*, 'N' FROM WBS_REQ W UNION ALL SELECT W.*, 'N' FROM WBS_RSLT W ) /* ========== 일반 결재: 문제에 없는 건 (NOT EXISTS) ========== */ , CONF_GEN AS ( SELECT S.TODO_NO AS BASE_ISS_TODO_NO , S.TODO_KEY, S.TODO_NO , CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(50)) AS ISS_NO , S.TODO_NO AS REQ_NO , 1 AS CHAIN_SEQ , CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS PAR_TODO_KEY , CASE WHEN S.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV1100','TODODIV2100','TODODIV1120','TODODIV2120','TODODIV2040','TODODIV1080') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_DIRECT FROM SEARCH_ALL S WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM BASE_WBS W WHERE W.TODO_KEY = S.TODO_KEY) ) /* ========== 전체 통합 ========== */ , CONF_ALL AS ( SELECT S.* , C.CHAIN_SEQ, C.PAR_TODO_KEY, C.ISS_NO, C.REQ_NO , NVL(C.ISS_NO, TO_CHAR(S.TODO_KEY)) AS CHAIN_ROOT_KEY , C.IS_DIRECT FROM SEARCH_ALL S JOIN (SELECT * FROM CONF_WBS UNION ALL SELECT * FROM CONF_GEN) C ON S.TODO_KEY = C.TODO_KEY ) /* 검색 필터링 */ , CHAIN_FILTER AS ( SELECT C.* , MAX(C.SEARCH_MATCH_FLAG) OVER (PARTITION BY C.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, C.CHAIN_ROOT_KEY) AS CHAIN_HAS_MATCH , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY C.TODO_NO, C.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, C.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID ORDER BY C.SEARCH_MATCH_FLAG DESC, C.TODO_KEY ASC) AS NODE_RANK FROM CONF_ALL C ) , FILTERED AS ( SELECT * FROM CHAIN_FILTER WHERE CHAIN_HAS_MATCH = 1 AND NODE_RANK = 1 ) /* ========== 메타데이터 매핑 ========== */ , MAPPED_DATA AS ( SELECT T.* , CASE WHEN T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV10', 'TODODIV010') THEN 'SHARE' ELSE 'APPR' END AS APPR_DIV , TRIM(REPLACE( CASE FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID) WHEN '발주/출장요청' THEN '발주요청' WHEN '발주/출장결과' THEN '발주결과' WHEN '출장자사진업로드' THEN '출장' WHEN '대금지급요청결재' THEN '대금지급' WHEN '대금지급요청공유' THEN '대금지급' WHEN '업무요청공유' THEN '업무요청' WHEN '업무요청결재' THEN '업무요청' ELSE FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID) END, 'WBS', '')) AS PGM_NM , MN.NAME AS TODO_NM , MC.NAME AS CREAT_NM , TRIM(REPLACE(FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID), 'WBS', '')) AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM , (SELECT MAX(ISS_SJ) FROM TB_WB24M02 ISS_M WHERE T.CO_CD = ISS_M.CO_CD AND ISS_M.ISS_NO = T.ISS_NO) AS ISS_SJ , (SELECT FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(MAX(ISS_STS)) FROM TB_WB24M02 ISS_M WHERE T.CO_CD = ISS_M.CO_CD AND ISS_M.ISS_NO = T.ISS_NO) AS ISS_STS_NM , (SELECT MAX(ISS_CNTS) FROM TB_WB24M02 ISS_M WHERE T.CO_CD = ISS_M.CO_CD AND ISS_M.ISS_NO = T.ISS_NO) AS ISS_CNTS , (SELECT MAX(QM2.REQ_RMK) FROM TB_QM01M01 QM2 WHERE QM2.REQ_NO = T.REQ_NO) AS REQ_RMK , (SELECT MAX(MA.NAME) FROM TB_WB24M02 ISS_M LEFT JOIN TB_CM06M01 MA ON ISS_M.ACT_ID = MA.ID WHERE T.CO_CD = ISS_M.CO_CD AND ISS_M.ISS_NO = T.ISS_NO) AS ACT_ID_NM , (SELECT TO_CHAR(MIN(TO_NUMBER(P22.VER_NO))) FROM TB_WB22M01 P22 WHERE P22.SALES_CD = T.SALES_CD) AS PLAN_VER_NO , CR.CTRT_NM, BC.CLNT_NM, PJ.CODE_NM AS PJT_NM, ODV.CODE_NM AS ORDRS_DIV_NM, EQ.EQP_NM FROM FILTERED T LEFT JOIN TB_CM06M01 MN ON T.TODO_ID = MN.ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM06M01 MC ON (SELECT CREAT_ID FROM TB_WB20M03 WHERE TODO_KEY = T.TODO_KEY) = MC.ID LEFT JOIN TB_CR02M01 CR ON T.CO_CD = CR.CO_CD AND T.ORDRS_NO_VAL = CR.ORDRS_NO LEFT JOIN TB_BM02M01 BC ON CR.ORDRS_CLNT_CD = BC.CLNT_CD LEFT JOIN TB_CM05M01 PJ ON CR.CLNT_PJT = PJ.CODE_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM05M01 ODV ON CR.ORDRS_DIV = ODV.CODE_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CR02D02 EQ ON T.CO_CD = EQ.CO_CD AND T.SALES_CD = EQ.SALES_CD ) /* ========== 최종 노드 구성 ========== */ , ALL_NODES AS ( /* 결재/공유 루트 */ SELECT DISTINCT 'GROUP' AS NODE_TYPE, APPR_DIV AS NODE_ID, 'root' AS PARENT_NODE_ID , CASE APPR_DIV WHEN 'APPR' THEN '결재' ELSE '공유' END AS NODE_NAME , 1 AS NODE_LEVEL, CASE APPR_DIV WHEN 'APPR' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS SORT1 , 0 AS SORT2, 0 AS SORT3, '0' AS SORT4, '0' AS SORT5, '0' AS SORT6, NULL AS TODO_KEY , NULL AS CO_CD, NULL AS PLAN_VER_NO FROM MAPPED_DATA UNION ALL /* 수주번호 그룹 */ SELECT 'GROUP', APPR_DIV || '_O_' || ORDRS_NO_VAL, APPR_DIV , ORDRS_NO_VAL || '
' || MAX(CLNT_NM) || ' ' || MAX(PJT_NM) , 2, CASE APPR_DIV WHEN 'APPR' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END , 1, TO_NUMBER(NVL(ORDRS_NO_VAL, '0')) * -1, '0', '0', '0', NULL , MAX(CO_CD) AS CO_CD, MAX(PLAN_VER_NO) AS PLAN_VER_NO FROM MAPPED_DATA WHERE ORDRS_NO_VAL IS NOT NULL GROUP BY APPR_DIV, ORDRS_NO_VAL UNION ALL /* 기타 그룹 */ SELECT 'GROUP', APPR_DIV || '_ETC', APPR_DIV, '기타' , 2, CASE APPR_DIV WHEN 'APPR' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, 2, 0, '0', '0', '0', NULL , MAX(CO_CD) AS CO_CD, MAX(PLAN_VER_NO) AS PLAN_VER_NO FROM MAPPED_DATA WHERE ORDRS_NO_VAL IS NULL GROUP BY APPR_DIV UNION ALL SELECT 'GROUP', APPR_DIV || '_O_' || ORDRS_NO_VAL || '_S_' || NVL(SALES_CD, 'EMPTY') , APPR_DIV || '_O_' || ORDRS_NO_VAL , SALES_CD || '
' || MAX(EQP_NM) , 3, CASE APPR_DIV WHEN 'APPR' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END , 1, TO_NUMBER(NVL(ORDRS_NO_VAL, '0')) * -1, NVL(SALES_CD, ' '), '0', '0', NULL , MAX(CO_CD) AS CO_CD, MAX(PLAN_VER_NO) AS PLAN_VER_NO FROM MAPPED_DATA WHERE ORDRS_NO_VAL IS NOT NULL AND IS_DIRECT = 'N' GROUP BY APPR_DIV, ORDRS_NO_VAL, SALES_CD UNION ALL SELECT 'ITEM' AS NODE_TYPE, 'TODO_' || TODO_KEY AS NODE_ID , CASE WHEN PAR_TODO_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'TODO_' || PAR_TODO_KEY WHEN ORDRS_NO_VAL IS NULL THEN APPR_DIV || '_ETC' WHEN IS_DIRECT = 'Y' THEN APPR_DIV || '_O_' || ORDRS_NO_VAL ELSE APPR_DIV || '_O_' || ORDRS_NO_VAL || '_S_' || NVL(SALES_CD, 'EMPTY') END AS PARENT_NODE_ID , CASE WHEN TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV1040','TODODIV2020','TODODIV1050','TODODIV2030') THEN '[' || PGM_NM || '] ' || NVL(CREAT_NM, TODO_NM) || CASE WHEN REQ_RMK IS NOT NULL THEN '/' || REQ_RMK ELSE '' END WHEN TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV1015' THEN '[' || PGM_NM || '] ' || NVL(SUBSTR(TODO_TITL, INSTR(TODO_TITL, ':', -1) + 1), TODO_TITL) WHEN TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV1030','TODODIV1090','TODODIV2060','TODODIV2090','TODODIV2070','TODODIV1060') THEN '[' || PGM_NM || '] ' || NVL(ACT_ID_NM, TODO_NM) || '/' || NVL(ISS_SJ, TODO_TITL) || CASE WHEN ISS_CNTS IS NOT NULL THEN '/' || ISS_CNTS ELSE '' END ELSE '[' || PGM_NM || '] ' || TODO_TITL END AS NODE_NAME , 10 AS NODE_LEVEL , CASE APPR_DIV WHEN 'APPR' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS SORT1 , CASE WHEN ORDRS_NO_VAL IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS SORT2 , TO_NUMBER(NVL(ORDRS_NO_VAL, '0')) * -1 AS SORT3 , NVL(SALES_CD, ' ') AS SORT4 , NVL(CHAIN_ROOT_KEY, '0') AS SORT5 , TO_CHAR(NVL(CHAIN_SEQ, 0)) AS SORT6 , TODO_KEY , CO_CD , PLAN_VER_NO FROM MAPPED_DATA ) SELECT A.NODE_TYPE , A.NODE_ID , A.PARENT_NODE_ID , A.NODE_NAME , A.NODE_LEVEL , A.SORT1 , A.SORT2 , A.SORT3 , A.SORT4 , A.SORT5 , A.SORT6 , A.TODO_KEY , NVL(A.CO_CD, T.CO_CD) AS CO_CD , T.TODO_NO , T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID , T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , T.SALES_CD , T.TODO_ID , T.SANCTN_STTUS , T.PG_PATH , T.PG_PARAM , T.TODO_FILE_TRGT_KEY , T.TODO_TITL , T.CREAT_PGM , T.ETC_FIELD2 , T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_NM , T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_NM , T.TODO_NM , T.CREAT_NM , T.ISS_NO , T.REQ_NO , T.CTRT_NM , T.CLNT_NM , T.PJT_NM , T.ORDRS_DIV_NM , T.EQP_NM , T.ISS_SJ , T.ISS_STS_NM , T.ISS_CNTS , T.REQ_RMK , T.ACT_ID_NM , T.PGM_NM , NVL(A.PLAN_VER_NO, T.PLAN_VER_NO) AS PLAN_VER_NO , T.IS_DIRECT FROM ALL_NODES A LEFT JOIN MAPPED_DATA T ON A.TODO_KEY = T.TODO_KEY ORDER BY A.SORT1, A.SORT2, A.SORT3 , CASE WHEN A.NODE_TYPE = 'GROUP' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END , A.SORT4, A.SORT5, A.SORT6 , A.NODE_LEVEL, A.TODO_KEY
